name: Capital One Spark Cash Select for Excellent Credit

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $750 cash bonus once you spend $6,000 on purchases within the first 3 months of opening an account

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 1.5% cash back on every purchase, every day

sources.notes: Business Insider: no annual fee, $750 sign-up bonus, decent flat-rate cash back for small businesses
NerdWallet: 1.5% on all purchases, no bonus categories, no foreign transaction fees

notes: No annual fee business card for excellent credit. 1.5% flat cash back with no spending categories — simple and predictable. $750 welcome bonus for $6,000 spend in 3 months. Good for business owners with strong credit who don't want an annual fee. Compare to Spark Miles Select (1.5X miles) for travel-oriented businesses. No protections. Better than personal Quicksilver for business due to employee cards and business tools.
